news.title:
Elgi Equipments received an ESG rating of 66 from NSE Sustainability Ratings.
The rating was independently prepared using publicly available data, without Elgi's engagement.
news.summary:

news.title:
ELGi Equipments delays Coimbatore capacity expansion due to regulatory approval delays.
The project, announced in May 2024, aims to boost air compressor production capacity.
news.summary:

news.title:

The company confirmed no Unpublished Price Sensitive Information was shared during this meeting.

No immediate major operational effect; financial implications remain unclear.

news.title:

Gulf market logistics, demand uncertainties pose potential operational risks.

news.title:
Elgi Equipments shared FY26 transcript; targets USD 750mn revenue by FY31.
Operating in 120 countries, it emphasizes innovation and employee growth.
news.summary:
Elgi Equipments shared FY26 transcript; targets USD 750mn revenue by FY31.
Operating in 120 countries, it emphasizes innovation and employee growth.

news.title:
Elgi Equipments Ltd shared its FY26 strategic updates, reporting an 11% revenue growth led by ISAAME and North American markets.
Key innovations include energy-efficient compressors, IoT integration, and global expansion efforts while maintaining profitability.
news.summary:
Elgi Equipments Ltd shared its FY26 strategic updates, reporting an 11% revenue growth led by ISAAME and North American markets.

news.title:
Elgi Equipments' Dec 2025 net sales rose 21.7% Y-o-Y to Rs 605.6 crore.
Net profit increased 12% to Rs 89.7 crore; shares up 15.9% in 12 months.
news.summary:
Elgi Equipments' Dec 2025 net sales rose 21.7% Y-o-Y to Rs 605.6 crore.
Net profit increased 12% to Rs 89.7 crore; shares up 15.9% in 12 months.

news.title:
Elgi Equipments conducted a one-on-one physical meeting with Marcellus Investment Managers on Feb 24, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was disclosed during the meeting as per Regulation 30 (LODR).
news.summary:

news.title:
Elgi Equipments Ltd's subsidiary, ELGI Compressors USA Inc., incorporated ELGI Equipments Arabia Co. in Saudi Arabia on Feb 19, 2026.
The new entity will provide marketing services for air compressors. ELGI Compressors USA Inc. holds 100% ownership with a capital of 100,000 SAR.
news.summary:
Elgi Equipments Ltd's subsidiary, ELGI Compressors USA Inc., incorporated ELGI Equipments Arabia Co. in Saudi Arabia on Feb 19, 2026.
The new entity will provide marketing services for air compressors. ELGI Compressors USA Inc. holds 100% ownership with a capital of 100,000 SAR.

The rating was independently prepared using FY2024-25 public domain data.

news.title:
Elgi Equipments plans Rs.500-600 Cr capex for growth and global expansion.
Company aims to launch new products to strengthen its market presence.
news.summary:

news.title:
Elgi Equipments' Q3 consolidated sales rose 18% to Rs.1,003 Cr; standalone sales grew 22% to Rs.606 Cr.
Consolidated PAT increased 18%, standalone PAT up 13%; growth led by India, Middle East, Americas; Europe subdued.
news.summary:
Elgi Equipments' Q3 consolidated sales rose 18% to Rs.1,003 Cr; standalone sales grew 22% to Rs.606 Cr.
Consolidated PAT increased 18%, standalone PAT up 13%; growth led by India, Middle East, Americas; Europe subdued.

news.title:
SBI Mutual Fund acquired 2% stake in Elgi Equipments and 4% in ASK Automotive via bulk deals on Nov 25.
Elgi Equipments' Q2 net profit rose 27.7% YoY; ASK Automotive's PAT grew 18.6% YoY with 8.5% revenue growth.
news.summary:
SBI Mutual Fund acquired 2% stake in Elgi Equipments and 4% in ASK Automotive via bulk deals on Nov 25.
Elgi Equipments' Q2 net profit rose 27.7% YoY; ASK Automotive's PAT grew 18.6% YoY with 8.5% revenue growth.
